code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  else if b == 45 and not has
    neg = true
  else
    if has
      let v = if neg
        -cur
      else
        cur
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  let v = if neg
    -cur
  else
    cur
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, v)
end

mut out = ""
mut sum = 0
mut idx = 0
let count = nums.len()
while idx < count
  let v = match nums.get(idx)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  sum = sum + v
  if idx == 0
    out = "#{sum}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{sum}"
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
